title: January 2016 Back Page — A Message From Meera about Patronage Capital.
summary: If you were a member of AVEC in 1991, you should have received a check from us right around Christmastime. Why did you receive that check? As you know, you are a member of a cooperative. title: December 2015 Back Page  — Electronic AMR Meters are Working Well!
summary: A major system upgrade to install electronic automated meters throughout each AVEC community ended in August when the last of the meters were installed in Bethel. AMR meters feature automated meter reading capabilities that modernize our in-house operations and reduce overhead costs. They operate at 900 mhz...

title: November 2015 Back Page — 2015 Scholarship Winners Announced.
summary: The Alaska Village Electric Cooperative Board of Directors awarded scholarships totaling $9,500 to eight students from its member communities for the 2015 fall semester.
